rawContent.message: No previous snapshot - first QA run

html.message: No previous snapshot - first QA run

build.detail: bun run build passes with 0 errors. 8 pre-existing react-hooks/exhaustive-deps warnings in unrelated blocks (Accordion, Archive, ContentWithMedia, FullWidthMedia, PostHero, Tabs) - none in FeaturedEvents.

lint.detail: No lint errors or warnings in FeaturedEvents files.

registration.detail: block.json valid: apiVersion 3, name takt/featured-events, category takt-theme, all 12 attributes correct with proper types and defaults. File references valid. No child blocks.

attributes.detail: All 12 attributes verified in block.json against spec: anchor (string, no default), eyebrow (string, ''), heading (string, ''), description (string, ''), postsSource (string, 'automatic', enum [automatic|manual]), selectedPosts (array, []), postsLimit (number, 3), eventList (string, 'future', enum [future|past]), selectedEventCategories (array, []), selectedTags (array, []), hideIfEmpty (boolean, false), buttonLabel (string, 'View Event'). All match spec exactly.

edgeCases.detail: Empty state handling verified via code review and live rendering. When no events exist (current state): blocks with hideIfEmpty=false render ThemeHeading correctly without event cards - graceful. Block with hideIfEmpty=true is absent from rendered page (correctly hidden). Long content (variation 5) wraps correctly on all viewports with no overflow. Cannot test data-dependent edge cases (postsLimit clamping, single event layout, many events) because no tribe_events posts exist in database.

interactiveBehavior.reason: No interactive elements. Block is a static dynamic-content block with no JS behavior on frontend (no carousel, no accordion, no tabs). Editor interactions tested implicitly via FilteredServerSideRender pattern.

accessibility.detail: Automated a11y checks passed (no JS errors, no overflow, images have alt, links have href, heading hierarchy correct). No WAI-ARIA patterns apply (no carousel, no accordion, no tabs). Manual a11y items cannot be fully verified without event data. Code review findings: (1) date badge has aria-hidden='true' - correct per spec, date is decorative since content is conveyed by event title. (2) Card link uses entire card as <a> with sr-only span appending ': {event title}' to button text for screen readers - correct accessible label pattern. (3) Article element used per spec for semantic structure.
accessibility.patternCompliance: skipped - no WAI-ARIA patterns defined for this block type (vertical static list, no interactive patterns)
blockedTests: alt text meaningfulness on real images
link text quality on real events

markupDuplication.detail: No markup duplication detected. Card halves are not duplicated for responsive - they use flex-col/md:flex-row to reorder. No JS-based content cloning.

tsxPhpSync.detail: Automated sync check passed. False positive warning about root wrapper mismatch (TSX uses React fragment with InspectorControls + section, PHP uses section directly) - this is standard Gutenberg editor pattern, not a sync issue. Manual review confirms: (1) Section wrapper classes match: TSX 'featured-events dark bg-transparent!' = PHP 'featured-events dark bg-transparent!'. (2) Container classes match: both use 'container relative py-16 before:absolute before:bg-dark-pattern before:rounded-3xl before:-z-1 before:-inset-x-(--side-gutter) before:inset-y-0 md:before:-inset-x-8'. (3) ThemeHeading props match between TSX and PHP (className, eyebrow, heading, headingSize=3, description, columns=2, enableButtons=false, enableDescription=true). (4) Events list div class 'featured-events-list flex flex-col gap-6' used consistently. (5) No $attributes[] extraction anti-pattern - all variables auto-extracted. (6) @var docblock present for all camelCase variables. (7) wp_reset_postdata() called after loop - correct.

innerBlocks.reason: Block has no inner blocks - uses dynamic WP_Query rendering.

specCompliance.automatedChecks: pass - taktician_validate_test_page: page exists, 7 block instances, all in demo-containers, no stale markup, no unresolved placeholders.
specCompliance.detail: Test page has all 7 required variations with correct attributes. All variation attributes match spec. hideIfEmpty variation correctly absent from rendered output. Cannot verify data-dependent spec requirements (event card layout, date badge, venue display, buttonLabel on cards, query ordering) because no tribe_events posts exist in the WordPress database.

issues.description: No tribe_events posts exist in the WordPress database. All automatic-mode block variations return empty results. Cannot verify event card rendering, date badge display, venue name resolution, buttonLabel passthrough, query ordering (future ASC / past DESC), postsLimit behavior, or card layout. The block code is correct but untestable without event data.
issues.impact: Blocks render ThemeHeading correctly but no event cards are shown. The block appears to be working correctly for the empty state. However, the full card template (parts/card-tribe_events.php), event query logic, date formatting, and buttonLabel passthrough cannot be verified end-to-end.
issues.fix: Developer Agent or site administrator must create at least 3-5 tribe_events posts (with featured images, start dates, and venue associations) — including both future-dated and past-dated events — so functional QA can verify the full event card rendering pipeline.

issues.description: Card template article/link height duplication: <article class='... md:h-[349px]'> wraps <a class='... md:h-[349px]'>. The fixed height md:h-[349px] is applied to both the article and the anchor inside it. The anchor should control the height since it's the layout container; article does not need an explicit height when it contains a full-width/height child.
issues.fix: Remove md:h-[349px] from the <article> element. Keep it only on the <a> element which is the actual flex container. The article will naturally match the anchor's height via its content: <article class='flex flex-col md:flex-row'>

passedChecks: Build compiles without errors (0 TypeScript errors)
Block registers correctly with all 12 attributes matching spec
Page returns HTTP 200 with no PHP fatal errors
Block renders with correct CSS class 'featured-events' on wrapper
No JavaScript console errors during page load
No horizontal overflow at any viewport width (375px, 768px, 1024px, 1440px)
All images have alt attributes
All links have valid href attributes
Heading hierarchy correct (h2 for section heading via ThemeHeading)
No animations - reduced motion check N/A
Images have srcset, lazy loading, and dimensions attributes (per automated rules)
No empty image src attributes
ThemeHeading renders correctly with eyebrow, heading, description across all 6 visible variations
Long content wraps correctly without overflow on all viewports
hideIfEmpty=true correctly hides the entire section when no events match (variation 7 absent from rendered page)
No markup duplication for responsive
TSX and PHP wrapper/container/heading classes are in sync
No $attributes[] extraction anti-pattern in PHP
@var docblock present for all camelCase variables in PHP template
wp_reset_postdata() called after query loop
Date badge has aria-hidden='true' per spec
Card link uses sr-only span with event title for accessible button label
All 7 test page variations confirmed present with correct attributes
All 7 blocks wrapped in takt/demo-container
No unresolved placeholder IDs in block markup

qaRulesResults.blockedReason: No tribe_events posts in database - data-dependent checks cannot be verified

output.dataGapNote: The block code implementation appears correct based on code review. The PHP query logic, card template structure, date formatting, venue resolution, and buttonLabel passthrough all follow the spec correctly. However, without actual tribe_events data, end-to-end functional verification of event rendering is not possible. This QA should be re-run after event data is seeded.
